mapper.select: SELECT ID, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID, PRINCIPAL, PHONE, REPAIR_TYPE, REMARK, CONTRACT_DATE_START, CONTRACT_DATE_END, DELETED, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, MODIFIED_USER, MODIFIED_TIME, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_CODE, UNIT_NAME, COMPANY_ID, USER_ORG_ID, SERVICE_COMPANIES, ENTITY_TYPE, OUT_TYPE FROM E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT where ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, UNIT_NAME, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID FROM E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT where deleted = 0
and UNIT_NAME like #{unitNameLike}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT ( ID, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID, PRINCIPAL, PHONE, REPAIR_TYPE, REMARK, CONTRACT_DATE_START, CONTRACT_DATE_END, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_CODE, UNIT_NAME, COMPANY_ID, USER_ORG_ID, SERVICE_COMPANIES, ENTITY_TYPE, OUT_TYPE ) values (#{id}, #{externalCompanyId}, #{principal}, #{phone}, #{repairType}, #{remark}, #{contractDateStart}, #{contractDateEnd}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{externalCompanyCode}, #{unitName}, #{companyId}, #{userOrgId}, #{serviceCompanies}, #{entityType}, #{outType}
)
mapper.update: update E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT set EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID=#{externalCompanyId}, PRINCIPAL= #{principal}, PHONE= #{phone}, REPAIR_TYPE= #{repairType}, REMARK= #{remark}, CONTRACT_DATE_START= #{contractDateStart}, CONTRACT_DATE_END= #{contractDateEnd}, MODIFIED_USER= #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MODIFIED_TIME= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_CODE= #{externalCompanyCode}, UNIT_NAME= #{unitName}, COMPANY_ID= #{companyId}, USER_ORG_ID= #{userOrgId}, SERVICE_COMPANIES= #{serviceCompanies}, ENTITY_TYPE= #{entityType}, OUT_TYPE= #{outType} where ID = #{id}
update E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT set deleted = 1 where ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID, UNIT_NAME, PRINCIPAL, PHONE, REPAIR_TYPE, REMARK, CONTRACT_DATE_START, CONTRACT_DATE_END, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_CODE, COMPANY_ID, USER_ORG_ID, SERVICE_COMPANIES, ENTITY_TYPE, OUT_TYPE FROM E_M_EQUIP_REPAIR_CONTRACT WHERE DELETED = 0 AND ENTITY_TYPE = 1 AND SERVICE_COMPANIES LIKE '%' || #{useCompanyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' AND OUT_TYPE = #{outType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY CREATED_TIME DESC
